element.help-string: mongoDB instance, the default would be mgmt

element.name: duration

element.name: size
element.handler: if [ $size == 0 ] ; then /usr/local/bin/sdb cfg.report-storage-size-gb=None; else /usr/local/bin/sdb cfg.report-storage-size-gb=$size; fi;
element.help-string: size in GB, 0 reset to default

sequence.name: show
sequence.handler: size=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.report-storage-size-gb`; if [ $size ]; then ((size = size * 1073741824)); else size=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.report-storage-size`; if [ -z $size ]; then size=209715200; fi; fi; echo $size;

element.name: limit
element.handler: if [ $limit == 0 ] ; then /usr/local/bin/sdb cfg.report.max-keys-limit=None; else /usr/local/bin/sdb cfg.report.max-keys-limit=$limit; fi;

sequence.name: show
sequence.handler: max_keys=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.report.max-keys-limit`; if [ -z $max_keys ]; then max_keys=500; model=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.platform.model`; if [ $model == 'M-100' ]; then max_keys=25; else mode=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.cms.mode`; if [ $mode ]; then if [ $mode == 'legacy' ]; then max_keys=25; fi; fi; fi; fi; ((max_keys=max_keys*1000)); echo $max_keys;

element.name: limit
element.handler: if [ $limit == 0 ] ; then /usr/local/bin/sdb cfg.report.min-keys-limit=None; else /usr/local/bin/sdb cfg.report.min-keys-limit=$limit; fi;

sequence.name: show
sequence.handler: min_keys=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.report.min-keys-limit`; if [ -z $min_keys ]; then min_keys=10; model=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.platform.model`; if [ $model == 'M-100' ]; then min_keys=5; else mode=`/usr/local/bin/sdb -ne cfg.cms.mode`; if [ $mode ]; then if [ $mode == 'legacy' ]; then min_keys=5; fi; fi; fi; fi; ((min_keys=min_keys*1000)); echo $min_keys;

sequence.name: grep
sequence.help-string: Searches file for lines containing a pattern match

element.name: invert-match
element.help-string: Invert the sense of matching, to select non-matching lines

element.name: line-number
element.help-string: Prefix each line of output with the line number

element.name: no-filename
element.help-string: Suppress the prefixing of filenames on output

element.name: count
element.help-string: Print a count of matching lines for each input file

element.name: max-count
element.help-string: Stop reading a file after NUM matching lines

element.name: context
element.help-string: Print NUM lines of output context

element.name: before-context
element.help-string: Print NUM lines of leading context before matching lines

element.name: after-context
element.help-string: Print NUM lines of trailing context after matching lines

sequence.name: tail
sequence.help-string: Print the last 10 lines of debug file content

element.name: follow
element.help-string: output appended data as the file grows

element.name: lines
element.help-string: output the last N lines, instead of the last 10

sequence.name: ssh
sequence.help-string: Start a secure shell to another host

element.name: port
element.help-string: Port to connect to on the remote host

element.name: v1
element.help-string: Force ssh to try protocol version 1 only

element.name: v2
element.help-string: Force ssh to try protocol version 2 only

element.name: host
element.help-string: Hostname or IP address of remote host

sequence.name: cms-traceroute
sequence.help-string: Print the route packets take to network host

element.name: first-ttl
element.help-string: time-to-live used in the first outgoing probe packet

element.name: max-ttl
element.help-string: Set the max time-to-live (max number of hops)

element.name: port
element.help-string: Set the base port number used in probes (default udp/33434 tcp/80 icmp/1)

element.name: wait
element.help-string: Set number of seconds to wait for a response

element.name: pause
element.help-string: Set the time (in milliseconds) to pause between probes

element.name: gateway
element.help-string: Specify a loose source route gateway (8 maximum)

element.name: no-resolve
element.help-string: Don't attempt to print addresses symbolically

element.name: bypass-routing
element.help-string: Bypass routing tables and send directly to a host

element.name: source
element.help-string: Use specified source address in outgoing probe packets

element.name: host
element.help-string: Hostname or IP address of remote host

sequence.name: traceroute
sequence.help-string: Print the route packets take to network host

element.name: first-ttl
element.help-string: time-to-live used in the first outgoing probe packet

element.name: max-ttl
element.help-string: Set the max time-to-live (max number of hops)

element.name: port
element.help-string: Set the base port number used in probes (default udp/33434 tcp/80 icmp/1)

element.name: wait
element.help-string: Set number of seconds to wait for a response

element.name: pause
element.help-string: Set the time (in milliseconds) to pause between probes

element.name: gateway
element.help-string: Specify a loose source route gateway (8 maximum)

element.name: no-resolve
element.help-string: Don't attempt to print addresses symbolically

element.name: bypass-routing
element.help-string: Bypass routing tables and send directly to a host

element.name: source
element.help-string: Use specified source address in outgoing probe packets

element.name: host
element.help-string: Hostname or IP address of remote host

element.name: bypass-routing
element.help-string: Bypass routing tables and send directly to a host on an attached network

element.name: count
element.help-string: Number of requests to send (1..20 packets)

element.name: no-resolve
element.help-string: Don't attempt to print addresses symbolically

element.name: ttl
element.help-string: IP time-to-live value (IPv6 hop-limit value) (0..255 hops)

element.name: host
element.help-string: Hostname or IP address of remote host

element.name: bypass-routing
element.help-string: Bypass routing tables and send directly to a host on an attached network

element.name: count
element.help-string: Number of requests to send (1..2000000000 packets)

element.name: no-resolve
element.help-string: Don't attempt to print addresses symbolically

element.name: ttl
element.help-string: IP time-to-live value (IPv6 hop-limit value) (0..255 hops)

element.name: host
element.help-string: Hostname or IP address of remote host

element.name: follow
element.help-string: Monitor pcap file in real time

element.name: link-header
element.help-string: Print the link-level header on each dump line

element.name: no-dns-lookup
element.help-string: Don't convert host addresses to names

element.name: no-port-lookup
element.help-string: Don't convert protocol and port numbers to names

element.name: no-qualification
element.help-string: Don't print domain name qualification of host names

element.name: delta
element.help-string: Print a delta (in micro-seconds) between current and previous line

element.name: timestamp
element.help-string: Print a timestamp proceeded by date

element.name: hex
element.help-string: Print each packet (minus link header) in hex

element.name: hex-link
element.help-string: Print each packet (including link header) in hex

element.name: hex-ascii
element.help-string: Print each packet (minus link header) in hex and ASCII

element.name: hex-ascii-link
element.help-string: Print each packet (including link header) in hex and ASCII

element.name: mgmt-pcap
element.help-string: packet capture generated from management interface

element.name: snaplen
element.help-string: Snarf snaplen bytes of data from each packet. (0 means use the required length to catch whole packets)

element.name: filter
element.help-string: tcpdump filters - e.g. "src net 67.207.148.0/24 and not port 22"

element.name: address
element.help-string: ip address, ip address/netmask or object name
